description: The neat brick road of Shoeboxlandia gives way to a narrow dirt path. Towering shoe-trees rise on either side, their tangled laces hanging like vines. The air smells of leather polish and something faintly reptilian. A warped wooden sign stands at the trailhead.

wall.description: Dense tangles of shoelaces form an impenetrable thicket. You can hear faint hissing from within.

floor.description: A narrow dirt path, scuffed by few soles. Most shoes know better than to come this way.

secret_cave_entrance.description: A dark, gaping hole in the base of a massive shoe-tree. It looks like it leads deep underground into a secret cave.

item_potato.description: A fresh-looking potato is partially hidden under a cluster of lace-vines. How lucky!

edge_n.description: The path opens back north toward the safety of Shoeboxlandia.

exit_south.description: The dirt path plunges deeper south into the Shoelace Forest. You can hear hissing ahead — lots of it.

npc_sign.description: A warped wooden sign, half-overgrown with lace-moss. The words are carved deep into the rotting wood.

dialogue.text: The sign reads: '⚠ SHOELACE FOREST — Beware of snakes. Do not stop walking. Do not make eye contact with the laces. Management is not responsible for unraveling.'
Scratched into the bottom of the sign in shaky handwriting: 'Freddista's shack is at the end of the path. She's not what they say she is. — S'
The sign remains silent. It has told you everything it knows. Which is a lot for a piece of wood.

item_stick.description: A sturdy branch has fallen from one of the shoe-trees. It's just the right size for whacking things.
